notes: umb_review (iter-4) achieves 100% pass rate (15/15) across all assertions — perfect score
code_review achieves 60% — fails on complexity advisory, verdict format, target branch, and behavioral impact analysis
no_skill achieves 56% — fails on verdict format, stylistic nitpicks (flags pre-existing issues), and review length
umb_review is faster than no_skill (-13.5s avg) and uses fewer tokens (-1.7K avg) despite being more structured — the skill's scoping rules prevent wasted analysis of pre-existing issues
code_review is fastest (167s avg) but least accurate — its confidence-filtering approach misses behavioral impact and architectural analysis entirely
The 'no-stylistic-nitpicks' and 'diff-scoped review' assertions are the biggest differentiators — both code_review and no_skill flag pre-existing issues that umb_review correctly ignores
